quality_highlights.note: Excellent W3C-style spec with RFC 2119 keywords, tiered conformance levels, clear TOC
Professional status messages with purposeful emojis and run URL traceability

single_file_improvements.issue: 210 occurrences of 'This field supports multiple formats (oneOf):' leaks JSON Schema internals. Replace with 'Accepted formats:' and 'Format N:' labels.
run-failure message 'The show must go on... eventually!' lacks actionable guidance. Add link to run logs.
